leadText: The Exp. Charm (Japanese: けいけんおまもり Experience Charm) is a Key Item introduced in Generation VIII.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Exp. Charm increases the amount of experience the player 's party receives by 50% when in the Bag . This does not apply to Poké Jobs or Exp. Candies .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Sw Sh BD SP LA S V * A charm that increases the Exp. Points that Pokémon can get. A machine-like object is inside the charm. S V * Having one of these charms increases the Exp. Points your Pokémon get. It's a strange, stretchy charm that encourages growth.

Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Method Sw Sh IA Master Dojo (from Hyde upon entering for the first time) S V TM Ogre Oustin' (after completing Easy difficulty for the first time)

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] According to Hyde , the Exp. Charm is one of his inventions.
